# PlainLaw - AI Legal Document Simplifier

PlainLaw is an AI-powered tool designed to help people understand complex legal documents by summarizing them into plain English.

## Key Features
- **Plain-English Summaries**: Translates legal jargon into human-readable text.
- **Risk Detection**: Flags predatory or one-sided clauses.
- **Actionable Insights**: Provides questions to ask regarding contracts.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://simplifylegaldocument.online/)
- [Simplify NDA](https://simplifylegaldocument.online/simplify-nda)
- [About Us](https://simplifylegaldocument.online/about)
- [Blog](https://simplifylegaldocument.online/blog)
- [Contact](https://simplifylegaldocument.online/contact)

## Disclaimer
PlainLaw is NOT a law firm and does not provide legal advice. AI summaries should be verified by a qualified attorney.
